text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm out with Agnes Digital shopping<n>for
Umamusume merch, when...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Look at that super long line.<n>What do you
think they're selling?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They're not necessarily selling<n>anything, but we
go take a look and<n>find...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with<n>our New
Year's raffle! This year's<n>grand prize is a hot
spring vacation<n>for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot<n>hamburger
steak! Second-prize<n>winners get a bushel of
carrots! And<n>third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you<n>by! Hey! You,
with the big bow! Want<n>to give it a try?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you get some kinda Uma merch if<n>you get the
very last ball? If so, I'll<n>pull them all!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I stop Agnes Digital before she<n>throws all her
cash at the clerk and<n>convince her to just try
once.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... is this one of those scenes<n>where I get
just one chance, but still<n>get super happy no
matter what I<n>get? Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Despite the slim chances of winning<n>some Uma
merch, I'll give it a spin<n>and pray for something
close!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Show me the Umas!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With that slightly off-kilter plea, we<n>both take hold
of the raffle machine's<n>lever and give it a spin!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the<n>tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves<n>a
grand-prize winner! Come and get<n>the coupon for
your hot spring<n>vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hwoooaaa?! We got a holy macker—Imean, grand prize?! Talk abouthitting the jackpot!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: We're going on a vacation... Gasp!Do you know what that means?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's a private offline meet-up! We getto spend two whole days togethertalking about Umamusume inperson!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
We can go over everyone we've<n>seen over our
three years together!<n>From the rookie Umas fresh
off their<n>debut to the refined and mature<n>seniors!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
We can stay up all night talking about<n>all our
Twinkle Series memories! After<n>we've finished
our twelve-season<n>run, that is!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she really meant it when<n>she said
"all" of our Twinkle Series<n>memories.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That means we've gotta prepare<n>tons and tons of
good memories if we<n>want this to be the best trip
ever.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, can you hold onto that ticket until<n>we're ready,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In the meantime, I'll become a living<n>photo album
capturing everyone's<n>precious moments!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
All fired up to collect more mementos<n>for our
future trip, Agnes Digital starts<n>the year off with
more heat than a hot<n>spring.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize<n>winner!
Congratulations! You get one<n>deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohh... We got the B prize—I mean thefirst prize! Quick, hit record! I wannaremember this moment!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A deluxe carrot hamburger steak...<n>Nice! I want
something special to go<n>with it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, you. If you wanna makesomething extra delicious, youneed to top it off with a bit of fantasizing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Picture a soft, hearty hamburger<n>steak surrounded
by a throng of<n>peaceful, precious Umas...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I could eat three whole bowls of rice<n>thinking
about it! Just imagine what I<n>could do with this
hamburger steak<n>with a fantasy like that as a
side!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right! I need to get home right away<n>and get
started on this fantasy dinner!<n>You're coming too!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Later, Agnes Digital and I enjoy our<n>prize
hamburger steak while she<n>fantasizes about a
round-table feast<n>full of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's<n>your lucky
day! You're going home<n>with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wow, a whole bushel. It looks like<n>they cleared out
the whole<n>storehouse.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Anyways... Hehehe... The more you<n>look at 'em...
Don't you think these<n>carrots start to look like
Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: For instance... Here, look at this one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It looks slim and tough, but it's<n>probably tender on
the inside... Just<n>like Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And then the smaller one next to it<n>reminds me of
Akebono's collarbone.<n>And the one with all the
leaves is like<n>Fuji wearing a big stage wig... ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh! And if you view this one from acertain angle—yeah, that's so her.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her unique skill is being able to see<n>Umamusume
in anything. She<n>carefully observes each carrot
before<n>savoring its flavor.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won<n>the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
One carrot... Well, I was only given<n>one chance, so
I guess that tracks.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nah. I'm well aware of how tough it is<n>to arrange
a raffle.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Thinking up the lineup of prizes,<n>procuring the
items, and then<n>arranging them in a display... It's
certainly no cakewalk.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Anyone who thinks they're gonna<n>take home the
one prize that rules<n>them all with just one shot is
a<n>nutcase.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
At the end of the day, simping is<n>about support,
and that's my default<n>state of mind. Yessir...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On the way back to campus, Agnes<n>Digital
appears enlightened as she<n>enjoys her singular
carrot.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you<n>pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of<n>tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Tissues, huh? ...Oh! Maybe<n>they have an
Umamusume design!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, doesn't look like it. They're just<n>plain,
ordinary tissues...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I guess this beats getting random<n>tissues from
someone promoting<n>something on the street...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I hate getting handouts fromstrangers. Whenever they try, Ialways just run away. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
All that said, a loss is a loss at the<n>end of the day.
Agnes Digital winds<n>up feeling a little down.
